findings.evidence: New line 66 is `cubeVertices_subset (Finset.erase_subset v S) x`; existing API is `cubeVertices_subset` at `TauCeti/LowDimTopology/Plumbing/CubeWeight.lean:123`.
findings.fix: Remove this declaration and use `cubeVertices_subset (Finset.erase_subset v S) x` directly where needed.
findings.issue: `cubeVertices_lowerFace_subset` is exactly the existing subcube-vertex monotonicity lemma specialized to `Finset.erase_subset`.

findings.evidence: New line 85 is `P.characteristicCubeWeight_mono k (Finset.erase_subset v S) x`; existing API is `characteristicCubeWeight_mono` at `TauCeti/LowDimTopology/Plumbing/CubeWeight.lean:233`.
findings.fix: Remove this declaration and in `characteristicLowerFaceExponent_intCast` use `P.characteristicCubeWeight_mono k (Finset.erase_subset v S) x` directly.
findings.issue: `characteristicLowerFaceWeight_le` is exactly the existing characteristic cube-weight monotonicity lemma specialized to `Finset.erase_subset`.

summary: The lower-face API adds direct specializations of existing cube monotonicity lemmas; those declarations should be removed rather than introducing parallel names.
